title: missing completion
body:
```
[root@Centos8 ~]# podman run --re
--read-only        --read-only-tmpfs       
[root@Centos8 ~]# podman run --read-only
--read-only        --read-only-tmpfs  
[root@Centos8 ~]# podman run --read-only
```
version
```
[root@Centos8 ~]# podman --version
podman version 2.0.6
```
